title: Mr. Monk Buys a House
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk buys the house of recently deceased Joseph Moody to escape a noisy neighbor. The death was no accident — a hidden cache of 1968 bank-robbery money is behind two murders.

deaths.notes: Cassie Drake, Moody's private nurse, pushed him down the stairs to keep the hidden $4 million a secret.
Jake stabbed his girlfriend/accomplice Cassie after Monk exposed her role and she became a liability.

title: Mr. Monk and the Genius
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Chess grandmaster Patrick Kloster poisons his wife Linda for her $10 million insurance policy, mirroring an earlier crime against his first wife Tatiana.

deaths.notes: Patrick used oleander-derived poison to cause a fatal heart attack, killing Linda for her $10 million insurance policy.

title: Mr. Monk Gets Lotto Fever
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Natalie becomes the California lottery announcer after the previous one is murdered; the lottery machine had been rigged.

deaths.notes: Billy stabbed lotto announcer Marissa with scissors to prevent her from exposing the rigged lottery machine.

title: Mr. Monk Takes a Punch
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk tries to protect boxer Ray Regis from an assassin hired because Regis knows about stolen paintings. A bomb in a punching bag kills an innocent bystander.

deaths.notes: Hitman Charles Bach planted a bomb in Ray Regis's punching bag; vagrant Eddie accidentally triggered it.

title: Mr. Monk Is Underwater
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk investigates the death of a submarine executive officer aboard the USS Seattle. The killer staged a suicide to conceal a career-ending navigation error.

deaths.notes: Whitaker forced Pierce to drink vodka at gunpoint then shot him and staged it as a suicide to prevent Pierce from revealing a cover-up of a submarine accident.

title: Mr. Monk Falls in Love
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A war criminal working as a cab driver is murdered by a refugee's mother; Monk insists the beautiful suspect Leyla is innocent.

deaths.notes: Leyla's mother stabbed war criminal Karsten Emerik (the Butcher of Zemenia) with a hat pin in the back of his taxi cab.

title: Mr. Monk's 100th Case
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk's 100th case is covered by a TV news magazine. While watching the broadcast, Monk realizes a second, separate killer exploited the serial killer's MO to commit an unrelated murder.

deaths.notes: Serial killer Douglas Thurman strangled multiple young actresses; Cassandre Rank was one of his victims.
TV journalist James Novak strangled his mistress Kate Kindel and mimicked Thurman's MO to frame the serial killer.

title: Mr. Monk Gets Hypnotized
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Sally Larkin fakes her own kidnapping to frame her husband for it, then murders him to avoid a prenup and claim his estate.

deaths.notes: Sally killed her real-estate mogul husband Aaron to collect his fortune before their divorce finalized, staging a fake kidnapping as a diversion.

title: Mr. Monk and the Miracle
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A pharmacist murders a homeless man who witnessed him painting fake miracle messages, and hides his dead partner's body on monastery grounds to prevent a renovation.

deaths.notes: Pharmacist Owen McCloskey suffocated homeless man Willie T., who had seen him painting fake miracle messages, then placed the body in a junkyard refrigerator.

title: Mr. Monk's Other Brother
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk's escaped half-brother Jack Jr. is accused of murdering a prison social worker, but the real killer is the corrupt guard who set him up as a patsy.

deaths.notes: Prison guard Daniel Reese murdered social worker Lindsey Bishop (his affair partner) and framed Jack Jr. for the killing to cover up the relationship.

title: Mr. Monk on Wheels
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A corporate assistant steals genetically modified seeds by having a bicycle thief copy the lock combination; when the thief draws too much attention she kills him.

deaths.notes: Sarah Longson, Dr. Berry's assistant, shot bicycle thief Kuramoto in a cemetery after he drew too much police attention to her seed-theft scheme.

title: Mr. Monk and the Lady Next Door
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk befriends a sweet elderly neighbor while investigating a Guinness museum robbery and a subsequent jewelry store murder by the same thief.

deaths.notes: John Keyes killed Guinness museum security guard David Elliot during a robbery of an egg-eating robot exhibit.

title: Mr. Monk Makes the Playoffs
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A backup quarterback is bludgeoned to death by his own driver after catching the driver selling the team's playbook to the opposition.

deaths.notes: Limo driver Shawn Metzger bludgeoned quarterback David Gitelson with a tire iron when Gitelson threatened to report him for selling the team's playbook.

title: Mr. Monk and the Bully
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk's childhood bully hires him to follow his wife; the case uncovers a scheme in which an evil twin kills her own partner to take all the money.

deaths.notes: Patrice Gesner stabbed her partner Douglas Fendle with a steak knife to avoid sharing the proceeds of their scheme.

title: Mr. Monk and the Magician
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk's neighbor Kevin Dorfman is killed while filling in for a magician who uses his act to smuggle drugs and kills to protect the secret.

deaths.notes: Magician Karl Torini strangled Kevin Dorfman with a piano wire after Kevin discovered that Torini's stage equipment was used to smuggle drugs.

title: Mr. Monk Fights City Hall
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk chains himself to the garage where Trudy died to prevent demolition. Councilwoman Eileen Hill, who agreed to halt the demolition, is murdered by a man desperate to keep his affair secret.

deaths.notes: Paul Crawford strangled city councilwoman Eileen Hill with a custom necktie to prevent her from exposing their affair and threatening his wealthy marriage.

title: Mr. Monk's Favorite Show
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk idolizes the star of his childhood favorite TV show, but she is the murderer — she killed the accountant who had helped her rig an awards show and later tried to blackmail her.

deaths.notes: Actress Christine Rapp killed accountant Victor Timlinson after he tried to blackmail her over their conspiracy to rig a Silver Globe award.

title: Mr. Monk and the Foreign Man
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk bonds with Nigerian widower Samuel Waingaya over their shared grief and investigates his wife's hit-and-run death, which was concealed by murdering a witness.

deaths.notes: Drunk driver Kenneth Nichols struck and killed Ansara Waingaya in a hit-and-run while distracted on the phone.
Nichols beat housekeeper Maria Fuentes with a crowbar because she had heard him on the phone during the hit-and-run and could identify him.

title: Mr. Monk and the UFO
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk's car breaks down in a Nevada town where a fake UFO sighting draws internet enthusiasts — and a body. The killer staged the UFO story to lure people to find his sister's corpse so he could claim her inheritance.

deaths.notes: Kyle Larkin killed his sister Marge to inherit the family fortune, dumping her body in the desert where it went undiscovered until he staged a UFO hoax to attract searchers.

title: Mr. Monk Is Someone Else
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk goes undercover as deceased hit man Frankie DePalma to foil a mob assassination plot; the real target was never the nominal victim but someone else entirely.

deaths.notes: Mob boss Jimmy Barlowe had Stanley Greenblatt killed to flush out Greenblatt's son Alvin, who had skimmed money from one of Jimmy's casinos.

title: Mr. Monk Takes the Stand
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Sculptor Evan Gildea murders his estranged wife and is acquitted after his lawyer shreds Monk on the stand, causing Monk to doubt himself.

deaths.notes: Sculptor Evan Gildea bludgeoned his estranged wife Nancy with a marble sculpture; he used one that lacked his initials to avoid damaging his own work.

title: Mr. Monk and the Critic
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Theater critic John Hannigan murders his mistress to protect his career and wealthy engagement, while Natalie tries to prove he wasn't even watching Julie's performance.

deaths.notes: Theater critic John Hannigan pushed waitress Callie Esterhaus over a hotel balcony to prevent her from exposing their affair and ruining his prestigious engagement.

title: Mr. Monk and the Voodoo Curse
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Voodoo dolls seem to predict deaths; only one is an actual murder. A paramedic exploited real accidents to create the illusion of a curse and poisoned her uncle for his inheritance.

deaths.notes: Paramedic Angeline Dilworth poisoned her uncle Robert Boyd with an untraceable drug to mimic a heart attack and claim his cell phone company fortune.

title: Mr. Monk Goes to Group Therapy
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk joins group therapy when his insurance runs out; someone starts killing off his fellow patients who could identify him as Tiffany Bolt's murderer.

deaths.notes: Xavier Danko murdered exotic dancer Tiffany Bolt out of obsession, then began killing therapy group members who could place him near the scene.
Xavier killed group therapy patient Barbara O'Keefe in her pool to prevent her from identifying him as Tiffany's killer.

title: Happy Birthday, Mr. Monk
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: On Monk's 50th birthday, a janitor is killed after taking his vacuum cleaner invention to a patent attorney who then double-crosses his own partner.

deaths.notes: Patent attorney Meckler murdered janitor Bradley Foster, the real inventor of a self-cleaning vacuum, to steal credit for the invention.
Pressman poisoned his partner Meckler with tainted ice cubes to avoid splitting the vacuum cleaner profits.

title: Mr. Monk and Sharona
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Sharona returns to collect a settlement after her uncle's death at a country club; Monk determines the fall was no accident but a murder arranged by the victim's golf partner.

deaths.notes: Golfer Perry Walsh lured Howie into a staged fall that turned into a real murder when Walsh pushed him to conceal their affair.

title: Mr. Monk and the Dog
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk cares for a missing woman's dog; when the woman's body is found, the dog's puppies become crucial evidence linking the killer to the victim.

deaths.notes: Steven DeWitt shoved his mistress Amanda Castle during an argument about hiding evidence of his marriage; her head struck the kitchen counter and she died.

title: Mr. Monk Goes Camping
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk joins a police camping trip; armed robbers who killed an armored car guard stalk the group to recover an incriminating bullet casing one of the boys picked up.

deaths.notes: Brothers Del and Luke Johnston shot an armored car guard during a robbery; a stray bullet casing found by a camping boy tied the brothers to the crime.

title: Mr. Monk Is the Best Man
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Stottlemeyer prepares to marry T.K. Jensen; his eco-terrorist ex-fiancee kills a blackmailing former accomplice and plants a gun in the captain's tuxedo to derail the wedding.

deaths.notes: Former eco-terrorist Stephanie Briggs shot her ex-accomplice Martin Kettering when he tried to blackmail her about their shared past.

title: Mr. Monk and the Badge
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk is reinstated to the SFPD and discovers a fellow officer was killed not by the serial killer everyone suspects but by a greedy tipster who wanted the full reward.

deaths.notes: Window-washer Manny Alvarez killed Officer DiMarco to collect the full serial killer reward himself rather than splitting it as agreed.

title: Mr. Monk and the End (Part 1)
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Series finale Part 1: Monk is poisoned and near death. Trudy left him a video message revealing her affair with Judge Rickover and the child she bore. Monk also uncovers that Rickover murdered nurse Wendy Stroud to bury the secret.

deaths.notes: Judge Ethan Rickover planted a car bomb that killed Trudy Monk twelve years before the series finale, to prevent her from connecting him to nurse Wendy Stroud's disappearance.
Rickover murdered the nurse who delivered his secret child with Trudy and buried her body in his front yard to keep the affair hidden.

title: Mr. Monk and the End (Part 2)
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Series finale Part 2: Monk survives, confronts Judge Rickover who confesses then shoots himself. Monk discovers Trudy's daughter Molly Evans survived and was adopted.

deaths.notes: The series finale resolves the twelve-year mystery of Trudy Monk's car bombing; Judge Rickover is confirmed as the killer before taking his own life.
Rickover grabbed Monk's gun and shot himself after his guilt was exposed and his career was ruined.
